Case# vmnet_return_t.VMNET_TOO_MANY_PACKETS

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.10+

```
case VMNET_TOO_MANY_PACKETS
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/vmnet/vmnet_return_t/vmnet_too_many_packets#Discussion)

Indicates failure due to the number of packets exceeding the system limit.
